description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched hip roof with wide eaves, giving it a substantial and grounded appearance. The structure is single-story, with a symmetrical layout and a central recessed entryway flanked by two wings. The front facade includes large, rectangular windows on either side of the entrance, providing ample natural light. The rear of the bungalow reveals a spacious covered porch or deck area, accessible through wide double doors. The exterior is finished in muted gray tones, with a smooth, uniform surface suggesting modern construction materials. The overall design is simple yet functional, emphasizing horizontal lines and open, accessible living spaces.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, symmetrical layout, large windows, and a central entryway, finished in muted gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central recessed entryway with double doors and large windows on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, uninterrupted hip roof and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a spacious covered porch or deck area and wide double doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar long roofline and window arrangement as the other side.
